_comment: Allowlisted npm advisories. Every entry: {"id": <advisory id or GHSA>, "reason": "...", "owner": "...", "expires": "YYYY-MM-DD"}. Must match a row in docs/operating/SECURITY_GATES.md.

allowlist.reason: HIGH in sharp pulled in by next; npm fix is a semver-major DOWNGRADE to next 14. Real fix arrives when next bumps its bundled sharp. An npm override would force a lockfile regen, prohibited on Windows (strips linux binaries; sharp is a native module). Expiry forces a re-check.
